zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alice Giffard於1273年出生在法國皮卡迪艾斯利貝蒙特時，她的父親Sir William de Giffard II23歲，母親Lady Alice Ribemont20歲。她於1293年與Sir Knight Richard de Hill在英國史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1361年在英國史洛普爾艾勒斯莫享年88歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾廷頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Alice Giffard于1273年出生在法国皮卡迪艾斯利貝蒙特时，她的父亲Sir William de Giffard II23岁，母亲Lady Alice Ribemont20岁。她于1293年与Sir Knight Richard de Hill在英国史洛普爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1361年在英国史洛普爾艾勒斯莫享年88岁，埋葬在英国英格兰史洛普爾廷頓。

nameMeanings.name: Giffard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: (i) relationship name from the Continental Germanic personal name Gifard. (ii) nickname, perhaps sometimes from Old French giffard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

variants.name: Jeffords
meanings: English: variant of Gifford , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Guiver
meanings: English: (i) nickname, apparently from Middle English giver ‘giver, donor, bestower’. (ii) variant of Giffard with voicing of /f/ to /v/ and loss of final -d.

variants.name: Gafford
meanings: English (southeastern): assimilated form of Gatford, a name of various origins. In Sussex and Surrey it is perhaps a variant of the habitational name Catford from a place so called in Somerset. Gatford is also from the habitational names Gateford (in Worksop, Nottinghamshire) or Gateforth (near Selby, Yorkshire), both formed with Old English gāt ‘goat’ + ford ‘ford’, influenced by Old Norse geit ‘goat’.

Probably also an altered form of German Gaffert: habitational name from Gaffert near Köslin, Brandenburg, or from a personal name formed with Middle High German gate ‘fellow, companion’. The surname Gaffert is very rare in Germany.

English: perhaps an altered form of Gatewood , an occupational name for a ‘goatherd’ (Middle English gate-werde, Old English gātweard) or for a ‘gate keeper’ (Middle English gateward, Old English ʒeatweard, dialect gātward).

variants.name: Gifford
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Giffard, either from the Middle English personal name Gifard, derived from an Old French name of this form deriving from ancient Germanic geb- ‘give, gift’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’, or perhaps sometimes a nickname from Old French gif(f)ard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alice Giffard was born in 1273, in Ribemont, Aisne, Picardie, France, her father, Sir William de Giffard II, was 23 and her mother, Lady Alice Ribemont, was 20. She married Sir Knight Richard de Hill in 1293, in Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1361, in Ellesmere, Shropshire, England, at the age of 88, and was buried in Whittington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alice Giffard est née en 1273, à Ribemont, Aisne, Picardie, France, son père, Sir William de Giffard II, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Ribemont, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Knight Richard de Hill en 1293, à Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1361, à Ellesmere, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 88 ans, et a été enterrée à Whittington, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Alice Giffard 1273 in Ribemont, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William de Giffard II 23 und ihre Mutter Lady Alice Ribemont 20. Sie hat 1293 in Shropshire, England Sir Knight Richard de Hill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1361 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Ellesmere, Shropshire, England und wurde in Whittington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Giffard è nata il nel 1273 nel Ribemont, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Sir William de Giffard II, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Lady Alice Ribemont, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir Knight Richard de Hill nel 1293, nel Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1361, nel Ellesmere, Shropshire, England, all'età di 88 anni, e fu sepolta a Whittington, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Giffardが1273年にフランスピカーディエイスンリベモントで生まれた時，父Sir William de Giffard IIは23歳，母Lady Alice Ribemontは20歳であった。1293年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアでSir Knight Richard de Hillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1361年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアエレスメアで88歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアウィッティントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Giffard(이)가 1273년 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 리브몽에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William de Giffard II(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Alice Ribemont(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1293년 영국 슈럽실르에서 Sir Knight Richard de Hill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1361년 영국 슈럽실르 엘레스머에서 88세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 휘틴그턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Giffard nasceu em 1273, em Ribemont, Aisne, Picardie, França, seu pai, Sir William de Giffard II, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice Ribemont, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Knight Richard de Hill em 1293, em Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1361, em Ellesmere, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 88 anos, e foi sepultada em Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alice Giffard родилась в 1273 г. в местности рибемонт, эисн, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Sir William de Giffard II было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Ribemont, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Knight Richard de Hill в 1293 г. в местности шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1361 г. в местности эллесмир, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 88 лет и была похоронена в местности уиттингтон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Sir Knight Richard de Hill en 1293, en Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1361, en Ellesmere, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 88 años, y fue sepultada en Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
